content:
# Session 4 (iter-004) — review of wave-2 scaffold

## Metadata
- Phase: autoformalize (wave 2 of dependent-file scaffold).
- Files scaffolded: `QuotConstruction.lean` (10 blueprint blocks + 1 helper),
  `Variants.lean` (11 blocks + 2 helpers). Both compile green: `lean_diagnostic_messages`
  = 0 errors, 0 `axiom`, only `declaration uses sorry` warnings.
- Sorry count: +19 sorry-stubs (8 in QuotConstruction, 11 in Variants); 3 sorry-free
  defs landed (`ProjectiveMorphism`, `StronglyProjective`, `hilbertScheme`).
- **MILESTONE: project skeleton complete.** All 7 chapters now Lean-backed. `dag-query
  gaps` = 0 (no ∞ holes); the goal node `thm:altman-kleiman-quot` has all 48 ancestors
  statement-backed. `frontier` = 0 (every remaining sorry is EGA-III gap-blocked, none
  "ready to prove" without foundations).
- No prover edits to existing files; this was pure scaffolding (`attempts_raw` =
  0 code_change edits, 2 Writes + 2 diagnostic checks).

## Per-target (QuotConstruction.lean — Nitsure §5)
- **`ProjectiveMorphism`** (`def:projective-morphism`) — SOLVED sorry-free def:
  `∃ quasicoherent E + closed immersion X ↪ relativeProj S E over S`. 'coherent'↦
  'quasi-coherent'; ℙ(E)↦`relativeProj` stub.
- **`StronglyProjective`** (`def:strongly-projective`) — SOLVED sorry-free def: as above
  with `IsLocallyFreeOfRank d E` (vector bundle).
- **`quot_grothendieck`** (`thm:grothendieck-quot`) — PARTIAL: `∃ Q, ProjectiveMorphism
  Q.hom ∧ Nonempty (quotFunctorPhi π E L Φ ≅ pointsFunctor Q)`. Reduces to Altman–Kleiman.
- **`quot_altmanKleiman`** (`thm:altman-kleiman-quot`, **PROJECT GOAL**) — PARTIAL:
  faithful, non-vacuous statement now typechecks. `X` closed in ℙ(V) (V loc. free), `E`
  coherent quotient of `π*(W)(ν)` (input `EWν` with `Epi qE`), `Φ∈ℚ[λ]` ⟹ `∃ Q,
  StronglyProjective Q.hom ∧ Nonempty (quotFunctorPhi π E L Φ ≅ pointsFunctor Q)`. The
  bundle `F=⋀^Φ(r)(W⊗Sym^r V)` is captured up to existence inside `StronglyProjective`.
- **`quot_projectiveSpace`** (`thm:quot-pn`) — PARTIAL: trivial-bundle case (V=O^{n+1},
  W=O^p); closed immersion into `projectiveSpace r S`.
- **`quot_reduction`** (`lem:quot-reduction`) — PARTIAL: (i) `∃ Eν` with functor iso at
  `Ψ=Φ.comp(X+C ν)`; (ii) `Epi φ ⟹ Mono η` ('closed embedding of functors' shadow).
- **`quot_uniformRegularity`** (`lem:quot-uniform-regularity`) — PARTIAL: `∃ m, ∀ r≥m`
  the pushforwards of abstract twist families (`ℤ → Modules`) are `IsLocallyFreeOfRank`.
- **`quot_embedGrassmannian`** (`lem:quot-embed-grassmannian`) — PARTIAL: `∃ r≥m, ∃ Gr
  (α : ... ⟶ pointsFunctor Gr), Mono α`. Relative Grassmannian of a bundle abstracted as
  `Gr : Over S`.
- **`quot_flatteningStratum`** (`lem:quot-flattening-stratum`) — PARTIAL: representable +
  `IsImmersion` into `relativeProj S F` (F existential) + `IsSeparated` + `LocallyOfFiniteType`.
- **`quot_properness`** (`lem:quot-properness`) — **PARTIAL PROOF**: first conjunct
  `IsProper Q.hom` genuinely discharged: `⟨valuativeCriterion_proper Q.hom hvc, sorry⟩`.
  Only the second conjunct ('proper locally-closed immersion ⟹ closed immersion') is sorry.

## Per-target (Variants.lean — Nitsure §6)
- **`quot_open_subfunctor`** (`lem:quot-open-subfunctor`) — PARTIAL: open `S'=(π''(suppF∩Y))ᶜ`
  with point-set universal property; expressible heart = properness⟹closed map. Support
  abstracted as closed `suppF`.
- **`stronglyQuasiprojectiveQuot`** (`thm:strongly-quasiprojective-quot`) — PARTIAL: `∃ F Q
  i, RepresentsFunctor ... ∧ IsImmersion i ∧ ...`.
- **`coherent_prolongation`** (`lem:coherent-prolongation`) — PARTIAL: `∃ quasicoherent G
  on S, Nonempty ((pullback U.ι).obj G ≅ F)`.
- **`quasiprojectiveQuot`** (`thm:quasiprojective-quot`) — PARTIAL: representable by
  quasi-projective Q (IsImmersion shadow).
- **`hilbertScheme`** (`def:hilbert-scheme`) — SOLVED sorry-free def:
  `quotFunctorPhi π (freeModule X 1) L Φ` (Quot of O_X).
- **`hilbertScheme_exists`** (`thm:hilbert-scheme-exists`) — PARTIAL: representable +
  closed immersion into `relativeProj S F`.
- **`flatness_local_criterion`** (`lem:flatness-local-criterion`) — PARTIAL: (1) finite-type
  flat ⟹ `IsOpenMap`; (2) flat locus `{y | RingHom.Flat (stalkMap y)}` open. (3) omitted
  (fibre construction deferred, A-K Ch.V citation).
- **`isomorphism_is_open`** (`thm:isomorphism-is-open`) — PARTIAL: opens `S₂≤S₁` with
  universal props for `π_T` Flat / IsIso via `pullback.map`.
- **`schemeOfMorphisms`** (`thm:scheme-of-morphisms`) — PARTIAL: `Mor_S(X,Y)` (helper
  `morFunctor`) represented by open subscheme of Hilbert of graphs.
- **`descent_of_subschemes`** (`lem:descent-of-subschemes`) — PARTIAL: (1) ffqc ⟹ IsColimit
  cofork (faithful); (2) set-level descent of closed Z (scheme-structure descent deferred).
- **`projectiveFlatQuotient`** (`thm:projective-flat-quotient`) — PARTIAL: quotient by flat
  projective equiv relation; full conjunction (quasi-proj Q, ffl+proper q, IsColimit cofork,
  effective IsIso). Capstone of §6.

## Key findings / patterns
- **Two representability shadows now diverge across files.** QuotConstruction uses
  `pointsFunctor Q` (universe-lifted yoneda, `Type (u+1)`) with `≅` natural-iso; Variants
  uses `RepresentsFunctor F Q := Nonempty (∀ T, (T⟶Q) ≃ F.obj (op T))` (objectwise bijection,
  naturality informal) because Hom-sets are `Type u` while moduli functors are `Type (u+1)`.
  **Both are honest but inconsistent** — flagged to planner to unify (recommendations P1).
- **Import deviation (Variants):** prover imported `Functors` only, NOT `QuotConstruction`,
  even though it now exists on disk (same-wave timing: QuotConstruction was written in the
  same prover round). Consequence: §6 results are self-contained shadows, not wired to
  `quot_altmanKleiman`/`quot_grothendieck`. Cheap follow-up now that both files are green.
- **`quot_properness` partial-proof pattern** carried over from Basic: route the IsProper
  half through `valuativeCriterion_proper` (= `IsProper.of_valuativeCriterion`, Mathlib),
  leave the geometric half as sorry. Reusable.
- Discipline PASSED: zero `axiom`; every gap a documented sorry-stub theorem/def; no
  vacuous statement (every conclusion carries content — functor iso, Mono, local freeness,
  IsImmersion, IsColimit, IsIso).

## Blueprint doctor (STRUCTURAL — must fix next iter)
- `blueprint/src/chapters/Functors.tex`: **`\grass` macro used but defined nowhere.**
  This crashes `leanblueprint web` (the doctor flags undefined-macro under the
  RecursionError class). Planner must define `\grass` (in `macros/*.tex` or a chapter-local
  `\providecommand`) or fix the typo. Surfaced in recommendations P1 and TO_USER.

## Coverage debt (dag-query unmatched = 3 lean_aux)
- `pointsFunctor` (QuotConstruction, sorry-free) — universe-lifted functor of points.
- `RepresentsFunctor` (Variants, sorry-free) — representability bijection shadow.
- `morFunctor` (Variants, has sorry in map/map_id/map_comp) — `Mor_S(X,Y)` functor.
- All three need blueprint entries (planner; see recommendations).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `sync_leanok` ran for iter-004 (`sync_leanok-state.json`: iter=4, added=32,
  removed=0) so `\leanok` is current. No `\mathlibok` candidates: both task results confirm
  no §5/§6 block is a pure Mathlib re-export (`quot_properness` routes through the already-
  flagged `Basic.valuativeCriterion_proper`, no new re-export). No renames vs blueprint
  `\lean{...}` (exact names used). No stale `\notready` found.

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: (1) fix `\grass` (blocks blueprint web build);
(2) unify the two representability shadows; (3) wire Variants→QuotConstruction import;
(4) blueprint the 3 unmatched helpers. No proof bodies are frontier-ready — all remaining
sorries are EGA-III gap-blocked, so the next productive non-scaffold move is a mathlib-build
objective for the foundational layer (coherent cohomology / Serre vanishing / relative Proj).
